array_types.name: String_List
array_types.code: type String_List is array (Positive range <>) of SU.Unbounded_String;

subprograms.name: Join
subprograms.code: function Join (List : String_List; Separator : String) return String

documentation.description: Return the number of lines that the string contains

subprograms.name: Split

documentation.description: Return the value without any LF and CR characters at the end
Return value with whitespace removed from both the start and end
